explicit_text: I was born in Pasadena, California in 1950 and grew up there in a small Filipino enclave. I attended several local schools including Sacred Heart, Washington, and John Muir High School, all in Pasadena. Our family was very tight-knit and we stayed in the Pasadena area for most of my childhood and early adulthood.

explicit_text: My father was born in the Philippines and came to the United States alone when he was 14. He later joined the U.S. Army and served during World War II. Our family’s roots trace back to the Philippines, and we formed a Filipino community in Pasadena after migrating here.
